features: [Material and color] the soft bath sponges are made of fiber sponge, feeling so soft and comfortable; Designed with variable colors so, color may vary.

[Cleanse] by creating a rich lather, our luxury bath sponges will help soothe your sensitive skin while gently exfoliating your epidermis and removing dead skin cells without causing skin irritations. Your delicate and sensitive skin deserves a soft bath sponge.

[Sturdy Bath Sponge] Soft and Durable shape will not be changed after using frequently and it never get smelly at all. Baby sponges for bath will not hurt your skin and shower sponges for men and bath sponge kids can be used with confidence

[Revitalize & Massage] Eluto bath massage sponges multipack provides plenty of foaming, cleaning the dirt and sweat from the skin, shower sponges for family and kids make your skin smooth and delicate in circular shape to remove the dead skin
[Good Value for Money] Made in the United Kingdom with High-Quality material, Solid Construction - these foam sponges are durable and dependable
description: Product description WHEN WAS THE LAST TIME YOU ENJOYED A SPA-LIKE BATH AT HOME? Now you can indulge yourself in the skin-soothing and rejuvenating experience of a true 5-star spa bath with Eluto bath body sponges for men, women, and children! The ultra-soft and gentle design of our bath sponges will allow you to relax and unwind after a long hard day at work. Specifications Material: Coral sponge Colors: 5 variable colors Quantity: 3 pieces Package includes: 3 x Exfoliating Coral Bath Sponges Directions Wet the sponge, apply body wash or soap, massage the body in a circular motion, and rinse off with water. Safety Warning Follow good hygiene practices when using bathing sponges, such as avoiding sharing them with others and cleaning them regularly to prevent bacterial growth. See more
